text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot some students asking Bamboo<n>Memory
and Inari One for help.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So what're ya sayin' exactly? That<n>there's a
ghost livin' in the mountains<n>near the academy?

text_block_list.name: Scared Student
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's been coming down<n>all the way
from the mountain to the<n>school, and it's even
been sighted in<n>the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, that sure sounds like a<n>threat to
academy order!

text_block_list.name: Anxious Student
text_block_list.text:
And a lot of students are losing sleep<n>'cause
they're so scared it's gonna<n>g-go into their
room...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, don't worry! If that spookster<n>shows up,
I'll take care of it right<n>there and then!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Always reliable, Inari! You're the<n>embodiment of
chivalry!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But of course! I can't just sit back<n>eating
popcorn when there are<n>younger students in
trouble!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm gonna do what I can too!<n>Let's get
right into it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Time to head up the mountain and<n>teach that
ghost a lesson!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gotta strike while the iron's haunted!<n>Let's go,
Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Waaaaahhhhh! W-wait! Lemme go!<n>I'm not
mentally prepared yet!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory grabs a panicked<n>Inari One's
hand and races off in a<n>whirlwind... Or so it
seems, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Almost forgot! You there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It'd be unethical to have students<n>climbing up the
mountain<n>unaccompanied! So...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We need you to come with us as our<n>guardian!
Please and thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...And so I find myself getting dragged<n>along to
the mysterious mountain.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, Bamboo? I feel like<n>someone's been
watching us this<n>whole time...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Worry not! If it's just looking at us,<n>that must
mean it's too scared to<n>make a move!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
R-right! Yeah! Nothing's gonna scare<n>us if we
stick togeth—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: W-w-w-wait a minute! When did it get<n>so dark?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It continues to get darker and darker<n>around us,
intensifying the<n>indescribably sinister
atmosphere!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, something's coming.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
W-w-we gotta get outta here! This<n>place is way
too creepy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oooh, it's getting closer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Now! Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...Using her bamboo sword, Bamboo<n>Memory
delivers a single blow to a<n>tree. Upon doing so,
the sinister<n>atmosphere enshrouding the area<n>
disperses instantly.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yes! Looks like I landed that one!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
S-so we're safe now? Thank<n>goodness... By the
way, I had no idea<n>you knew how to exorcise
ghosts.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who said I did?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry! When it comes to<n>fighting, it's
all about spirit! If you<n>scare off your opponent,
that makes<n>you the winner!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...At least that's what they said in this<n>show I
watched ages ago! Glad I<n>managed to teach ol'
ghosty a lesson!
choice_data_list: Guess this means we can relax.
Guess this means we can relax.
You two make a great duo.
You two make a great duo.
...What if the ghost hadn't gotten scared?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...At least that's what they said in this<n>show I
watched ages ago! Glad I<n>managed to teach ol'
ghosty a lesson!
choice_data_list: Guess this means we can relax.
Guess this means we can relax.
You two make a great duo.
You two make a great duo.
...What if the ghost hadn't gotten scared?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then I would've teamed up with Inari<n>and blown
it away with a wave of<n>guts!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...That would've been cooler, though.<n>Imagine all
the passion! Still, all's well<n>that ends well!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
B-Bamboo... You're seriously out of<n>your mind,
y-you know that? Geez...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...I guess the ghost backed off without<n>any fuss,
so that worked out okay for<n>us.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel like we walked a fine line<n>between life and
death, but it seems<n>as though the case has been
closed.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
A g-great duo? I was too scared to<n>even do
anything! I don't need your<n>consolation...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! You<n>were the one
who volunteered to<n>defeat the ghost and protect
the<n>younger students in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just brought the energy so I<n>wouldn't
embarrass you! This was all<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
B-Bamboo... Gaaah! I sure am lucky<n>to have
someone like you around!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh... If any other ghosts<n>start acting up
at the academy, just<n>leave it to us!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You said it! Now everyone at the<n>academy can
live their lives in peace!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Still, that was real touch-and-go for a<n>second
there. I'm glad you were with<n>me, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ghost or no ghost, no one's<n>disturbing the
peace! Not as long as<n>Inari and I are around!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following their successful exorcism,<n>Bamboo
Memory and Inari One are<n>flooded with requests
to handle other<n>ghosts.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You said it! Now everyone at the<n>academy can
live their—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's up? Cat got your tongue?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... It just feels like that<n>unsettling
atmosphere's still lingering<n>somehow...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe that ghost still hasn't<n>learned its lesson!
I'll have to give it<n>another thwack for good
measure!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
H-hold up! Don't leave me behind in<n>this creepy
place!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Mission complete! Okay, let's head<n>back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I don't wanna stick around<n>here for too
long.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's up with you? You look<n>like you're
carrying a huge load or<n>somethin'...
choice_data_list: M-my right shoulder... feels kinda heavy...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So anyone with enough determination<n>can scare
ghosts away... But what if<n>you're too terrified to
show that<n>determination?
